title: Undergraduate Student
about:
I am an undergraduate student at China Three Gorges University (CTGU), majoring in Hubei Innox Academy (Three Gorges). My research interests include image processing and computer vision. I am passionate about exploring the frontiers of visual intelligence and its applications.

Feel free to reach out if you are interested in collaboration or have any questions about my work.

news.content: Started my undergraduate journey at China Three Gorges University.
